POST.description: Deploys a Cyoda environment with specified user parameters.

suggested_workflow.complete_code_for_action_derived_from_th: async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session: async with session.post(f"{TEAMCITY_URL}/buildQueue", json=build_payload) as resp: result = await resp.json()
suggested_workflow.description: This action deploys a new Cyoda environment using the specified user parameters.

GET.description: Retrieves the deployment status of a Cyoda environment by ID.

POST.description: Deploys a user application with specified repository details.

suggested_workflow.complete_code_for_action_derived_from_th: async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session: async with session.post(f"{TEAMCITY_URL}/buildQueue", json=build_payload) as resp: result = await resp.json()
suggested_workflow.description: This action deploys a user application using the specified repository details.

POST.description: Cancels a queued or running user application build by ID.

suggested_workflow.complete_code_for_action_derived_from_th: async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session: async with session.post(f"{TEAMCITY_URL}/builds/id:{id}", json=cancel_payload) as resp: cancel_response = await resp.json()
suggested_workflow.description: This action cancels a user application build using its ID.

GET.description: Retrieves the deployment status of a user application by ID.
Returns the status of the Cyoda environment deployment specified by ID.
Returns the status of the user application deployment specified by ID.
